emails.subject:
Enron de Inversiones de Energia S.C.A. (an Argentine company)
 (EDIDE)
emails.subject_base:
Enron de Inversiones de Energia S.C.A. (an Argentine company)
 (EDIDE)
emails.body: Enron de Inversiones de Energia S.C.A. (an Argentine company) (EDIDE) Rafael, I send the request, dated 6/2/00, to Morgan Stanley to Contribute the shares from EPCA to EDIDE and then Convert EDIDE's shares to ordinary WHEN the account for EDIDE is open. Kelly has forwarded a copy to you. My understanding from Susan is that they are awaiting registration materials from you. Please let me know when Legal can expect to receive these. Thanks. Sheila Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 06/07/2000 08:48 AM From: Sheila Glover 05/25/2000 11:02 AM
